auth.login_intro: Sign in with your school account.

errors.account_locked: Account temporarily locked after too many failed attempts. Try again later.

classes.title: Classes
classes.name: Name
classes.school_id_admin_hint: As admin you must set the school explicitly.
classes.archive_confirm: Archive {{name}}? The row is kept; you can restore via the DB.
classes.error_school_id_required: Admins must provide a school ID.
classes.error_overlapping: Student already has an active membership in this class.
classes.teachers_description: KL / co-KL / substitute with date range.
classes.assign_teacher_description: Pick a teacher, role and date range.
classes.students_description: Active memberships. Mid-year transfers clamp the previous one to valid_from − 1s.
classes.add_student_description: Pick a student and set the start date.
classes.mid_year_hint: Mid-year transfers automatically close the previous active membership.

users.title: Users
users.intro: Teachers and students from Active Directory.
users.name: Name
users.search_placeholder: Search by name or sign-in name…

detail.section_mail_desc: Pick the domain from the allowed list.
detail.section_device_desc: Primary device comes from AD (read-only). Loan device during repair is managed here.
detail.not_found_desc: This user does not exist or you don't have permission.
detail.error_admin_only: Only administration may change these fields.
detail.error_upn_conflict: This sign-in address is already taken.
detail.error_user_not_in_ad: User not found in Active Directory. Check the sync.
detail.error_mail_domains_missing: Mail domains are not yet configured. Add them in Administration → System settings.
detail.error_domain_not_allowed: This domain is not on the allow-list.

field.sam_hint: Up to 20 chars. Letters, digits, dot, dash, underscore only.
field.temp_device_name_hint: While the primary device is in repair.
field.domains_missing: No mail domains configured. Administration → System settings.

password_reset.title: Reset student password
password_reset.mode_generate_desc: Magister creates a random password and shows it once.
password_reset.mode_manual_desc: Type a password yourself (e.g. when you've already handed one out).
password_reset.force_change_label: Require student to change password on next sign-in
password_reset.success_generate_note: Write it down or hand it over now — it will not be shown again.
password_reset.error_student_disabled: Student is disabled in AD — reset not possible.
password_reset.error_student_not_in_ad: Student not found in AD. Check AD sync.
password_reset.error_not_a_student: This user is not a student.
password_reset.error_password_policy: Password does not meet AD policy.

errors.title: Error
errors.ad_unavailable: Active Directory is unreachable — data may be stale.
errors.user_not_synced: Your account is not yet synced into Magister. Contact IT.
errors.csrf_invalid: Session expired. Please sign in again.
errors.rate_limited: Too many requests. Try again in a moment.

settings.title: System settings
settings.description: OIDC and AD configuration. Changes take effect immediately, no restart.
settings.oidc_section_desc: Issuer, client ID, client secret and redirect URI for teacher + admin sign-in.
settings.ad_section_desc: Domain controllers, bind DN/password and search base for the user sync.

field.oidc_client_secret_hint: Leave empty to keep the stored value.
field.ad_bind_password_hint: Leave empty to keep the stored value.

local_admin.title: Local admin account
local_admin.description: Break-glass access for initial setup and recovery when Entra ID is unavailable.
local_admin.change_password_description: Set a new password. At least 12 characters.
local_admin.password_mismatch: The two passwords do not match.
local_admin.error_not_configured: Local admin account is not configured.
